nodes.name: tdma_solver_d12
nodes.conceptual_summary: Compact Python equivalents of quantfin's tdmaSolver and cotraverseVec utilities.
nodes.decomposition_rationale: The two upstream functions have separate public contracts and no shared runtime state.

nodes.name: tdma_solver
nodes.description: Solve a tridiagonal linear system from sub-diagonal, main diagonal, super-diagonal, and right-hand-side vectors.

inputs.name: sub_diagonal
inputs.constraints: finite non-empty vector; same length as diagonal, super_diagonal, and rhs

inputs.name: diagonal
inputs.constraints: finite non-empty vector; same length as sub_diagonal, super_diagonal, and rhs

inputs.name: super_diagonal
inputs.constraints: finite non-empty vector; same length as sub_diagonal, diagonal, and rhs

inputs.name: rhs
inputs.constraints: finite non-empty vector; same length as sub_diagonal, diagonal, and super_diagonal

outputs.name: result
outputs.constraints: finite solution vector with length equal to diagonal

nodes.type_signature: (sub_diagonal: Sequence[float], diagonal: Sequence[float], super_diagonal: Sequence[float], rhs: Sequence[float]) -> list[float]

nodes.name: cotraverse_vec
nodes.description: Apply an aggregator to each index-aligned slice across a container of equal-length vectors.

inputs.name: aggregator
inputs.constraints: callable aggregation function returning a finite scalar

inputs.name: vectors
inputs.constraints: non-empty vector container; each vector has at least length entries

outputs.name: result
outputs.constraints: finite aggregated vector with requested length

nodes.type_signature: (aggregator: Callable[[Sequence[float]], float], length: int, vectors: Sequence[Sequence[float]]) -> list[float]
nodes.conceptual_summary: Index-wise co-traversal over a vector container.
